name: Dark Passage
desc2: A creature lurks ahead. Steel yourself — blood will be spilled.

name: Blood Trail
desc: A trail of blood leads into the dark
desc2: Fresh crimson stains mark the floor. Something wounded — or something feeding.

name: Lurking Horror
desc2: Dozens of unblinking eyes pierce the gloom. The beast is patient. You are not safe.

name: Strange Sound
desc2: A haunting tune drifts through the corridors. Approach, and face the unknown.

name: Forbidden Text
desc: A tome lies open, pages turning
desc2: Knowledge or madness — the pages whisper secrets no mortal should hear.

name: Supply Room
desc2: Someone abandoned their belongings here. Take what you can — you will need it.

name: Offering
desc: Something glitters on a stone altar
desc2: An offering to forgotten gods. The treasure is yours — if you dare claim it.

name: Safe Haven
desc: A moment of calm in the storm
desc2: A rare sanctuary. Tend your wounds, clear your mind, or prepare your body.

name: Mad Trader
desc: A figure deals in strange wares
desc2: Eyes wild, smile crooked. Their goods are real — the price, however, is never simple.

name: Suspicious Hallway
desc2: The stones shift beneath your feet. Every step could be your last. Tread carefully.
